{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged green madra
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A spike of [[Forged green madra]] was embedded in the dirt.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
